1311831e8bd7baab4338a41c47bf1cfaecebc449.text: The PaymentGateway retries failed charges with exponential backoff: a base delay of 200ms that doubles each attempt, up to a maximum of 5 attempts before the charge is marked permanently failed.

1aaa8fd672e05f9a6db2c6537d0f1a405bc4decf.text: The PaymentGateway retries failed charges with exponential backoff: a base delay of 200ms that doubles each attempt, up to a maximum of 5 attempts before the charge is marked permanently failed.

468586f8657a3a7452bd69cb5dcde9c4855a9e23.text:
fizzbuzz() {
  n=$1
  if [ $((n % 15)) -eq 0 ]; then echo FizzBuzz
  elif [ $((n % 3)) -eq 0 ]; then echo Fizz
  elif [ $((n % 5)) -eq 0 ]; then echo Buzz
  else echo "$n"
  fi
}
